SESH Pipeline Conditions for 1/22/2026


Notice Text:

For Gas Day January 22, 2026, Southeast Supply Header (SESH) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to SESH's operational capacity.  The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding SESH's operational capacity:








Restricted Locations Scheduled and Sealed Priority % Restricted Notes
IT 3 2 1
Gwinville    85%          
Gwinville East   97%          








OFO / Imbalance Notice






OFO ---





Imbalances Warnings No DS - System Wide












Systemwide Notes:














SESH has limited operational flexibility to manage imbalances.  As a result, SESH requires all delivery point operators to keep actual daily takes out of the system equal to or greater than scheduled quantities regardless of their cumulative imbalance position unless otherwise coordinated with your operations account representative. 








Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.








Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.


BackPrint
